heroDescription: An intimate art-filled setting for your next gathering
introHeading: A Space As Unique As Your Occasion
introDescription: Nestled in the heart of Vancouver's West End, Cafe Portrait offers an enchanting backdrop for private gatherings of all kinds. Our art-lined walls and warm, bohemian atmosphere create an unforgettable setting.
eventType1Description: Make your special day truly memorable in our intimate, art-filled space.
eventType2Description: Impress clients and colleagues in a setting that inspires creativity and conversation.
eventType3Description: Private dining experiences crafted with our seasonal menu and attentive service.
offering6Detail: Custom packages — contact us for a quote
bookingDescription: Ready to plan your perfect event? Fill out the form below and we'll be in touch within 24 hours.
